name: Agency Offer — 6 Week
subject: Playkit <> [Brand Name] Next Steps
body:
Hi {First Name},

So great chatting today! Thank you for taking the time. We're excited about the opportunity to work together. Here's a quick recap of what we discussed:

Our Offer
- 10 creators producing 900 unique videos on TikTok + 900 cross-posted to IG at $45k for your first 6 weeks
- A dedicated UGC Engineer owns strategy, content review, and daily iteration end to end
- Each creator posts 3x per weekday
- Organic and paid usage rights to all content pieces
- Access to Trackr, our in-house tracking software

Find our case studies here (https://playkit.xyz/case-study), as well as the deck we went through together here (https://www.canva.com/design/DAG5rVMaWYs/7AdJw3FlGSn7SCOCVgEqOQ/view?utm_content=DAG5rVMaWYs&utm_campaign=designshare&utm_medium=link2&utm_source=uniquelinks&utlId=he63f5cce80).

Next Steps
1. I've sent the contract for a [START DATE] start date via Agree for your team review. You can also access via the link {Contract Link}.
2. Once signed, you'll receive the invoice and an email with next steps: Slack invite, strategy call with your UGC Engineer, and we're off!

I've cc'd our Chief of Staff, Tyler Morris, who will help with communications moving forward and make sure everything runs smoothly.

Let me know if you have any questions as you review!

Best,
Julia
